_comment: Law L5 pin for the OFFICIAL Model Context Protocol TypeScript SDK, consumed UNMODIFIED. holo-mcp-sdk-witness.mjs re-derives the sha256 of each ESM entry we import and REFUSES on mismatch — the same verify-by-re-derivation the substrate applies to every object, applied to our one external dependency. integrity is the npm content hash (package-lock); files are the runtime entries holo-mcp-sdk.mjs / holo-mcp-http.mjs actually import.
name: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk
